plans.title: Contract And Compatibility
plans.description: Define the lazy-loading API contract without breaking older Workbench clients.

tasks.title: T001 Create SDD spec, plan, task tree, and metadata for lazy loading
tasks.description: Create the SDD artifacts for this feature.

tasks.title: T002 Define summary/detail API response contract
tasks.description: Define startup summary and one-spec detail payloads.

tasks.title: T003 Preserve legacy /sdd/project compatibility
tasks.description: Keep the existing full snapshot endpoint working.

plans.title: Backend API
plans.description: Expose lazy-loading endpoints and avoid unnecessary full snapshot reads.

tasks.title: T004 Add get_project_summary service behavior
tasks.description: Return project metadata and spec summaries without full artifact content.

tasks.title: T005 Add get_spec service behavior with safe spec_id validation
tasks.description: Return one complete spec and reject unsafe or unknown IDs.

tasks.title: T006 Optimize diagram reads to avoid full project snapshots
tasks.description: List diagrams without reading every plan/task file.

plans.title: Workbench Client
plans.description: Load the summary first and hydrate specs only when opened.

tasks.title: T007 Add /sdd/project/summary endpoint
tasks.description: Expose the lightweight project summary API.

tasks.title: T010 Add Workbench client summary/detail calls with legacy fallback
tasks.description: Prefer lazy endpoints while supporting older Bridge backends.

tasks.title: T011 Add lazy spec hydration/cache in the Specs tab
tasks.description: Fetch and cache selected spec details in the UI.

plans.title: Validation And Release
plans.description: Prove backend/frontend behavior and ship it to Codex Mobile.

tasks.title: T009 Add backend tests for summary, detail, 404, and diagrams
T012 Add Workbench tests for lazy loading behavior
tasks.description: Cover request order, hydration, cache, and fallback.

tasks.title: T013 Run backend, Workbench package, and mobile validation
tasks.description: Run backend, Workbench package, and mobile validation.

tasks.title: T014 Publish Codex Mobile Android release
tasks.description: Publish the Codex Mobile Android release after validation.
